text: The Financial Services Commission of Belize regulates digital assets.
BelizeChain provides sovereign blockchain infrastructure for Belize.
Federated learning preserves data privacy across participants.
KYC compliance is mandatory for financial services in Belize.
Quantum computing enhances blockchain security capabilities.
IPFS provides decentralized storage for blockchain applications.
The Belize Dollar (BZD) is the official currency of Belize.
Digital identity systems enhance security and privacy.
